<h2>Changes</h2>
<h2>🚀 Features</h2>
<ul>
<li>feat: add azure devops support <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/olblak/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/olblak">@olblak</a> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4325368545" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/issues/8586" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8586/hovercard" href="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8586">#8586</a>)</li>
<li>feat(autodiscovery/argocd): enhance support of ApplicationSet with multiple sources <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/af-beng/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/af-beng">@af-beng</a> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4387476610" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/issues/8677" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8677/hovercard" href="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8677">#8677</a>)</li>
<li>feat: allow Updatecli manifest dependson <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/olblak/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/olblak">@olblak</a> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4267037006" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/issues/8437" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8437/hovercard" href="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8437">#8437</a>)</li>
<li>feat: show updatecli warning if using outdated version <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/olblak/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/olblak">@olblak</a> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4317001006" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/issues/8567" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8567/hovercard" href="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8567">#8567</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h2>🐛 Bug Fixes</h2>
<ul>
<li>fix(autodiscovery/golang): correctly handle pseudo version <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/olblak/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/olblak">@olblak</a> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4446483201" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/issues/8698" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8698/hovercard" href="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8698">#8698</a>)</li>
<li>fix(autodiscovery/flux): skip HelmRelease without chart template to avoid nil pointer panic <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/jouve/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/jouve">@jouve</a> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4408012197" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/issues/8680" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8680/hovercard" href="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8680">#8680</a>)</li>
<li>fix: handle skipped condition dependencies in target gating <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/nickzerjeski/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/nickzerjeski">@nickzerjeski</a> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4252900097" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/issues/8426" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8426/hovercard" href="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8426">#8426</a>)</li>
<li>feat(autodiscovery/precommit): detect rev version from comment <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/nickzerjeski/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/nickzerjeski">@nickzerjeski</a> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4252707121" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/issues/8402" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8402/hovercard" href="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8402">#8402</a>)</li>
<li>fix(bitbucket): use FindBranch and paginate PR listing in pullrequest… <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/roulettedares/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/roulettedares">@roulettedares</a> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4319839226" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/issues/8584" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8584/hovercard" href="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8584">#8584</a>)</li>
</ul>
